summary: Restructured Counter (2) example list to one-to-one WIN attribution. Removed 'a westward shift coordinate' (WIN-060 does not cite a specific magnitude). Counter (2) now reads: 'a drift rate (WIN-059) or a +0.34 W/m²/decade trend (WIN-066)'. Added explicit routing note that WIN-060 routes through Counter (3) instead. Patch applied to data/sections.json:part2.html sign-only-non-discrimination. Build passed, 3616/3616 tests pass.
